# Robbie Torres

> Technical Program Manager with 12+ years running production e-commerce platforms and six years managing a frontend engineering team across 30+ sites. AI-fluent builder who uses Claude daily as a working partner across code, analysis, and shipping internal tools. Based in Oakland, CA.

## About

Robbie Torres is a Technical Program Manager based in Oakland, California. He has over 12 years of experience in e-commerce platform operations, web development, people management, and data analytics. He has managed web operations for 30+ websites, led a $20M e-commerce platform migration, built and led a frontend engineering team, and shipped production applications on Cloudflare Workers. He uses Claude daily as a working partner for code generation, debugging, data analysis, SQL, SOPs, and stakeholder communications.

## Digital Services

Robbie offers white-label digital services for small businesses in Oakland and the Bay Area:

- Web Design & Development: website redesigns, landing pages, hosting, maintenance, accessibility (WCAG)
- Search & Visibility: SEO, keyword optimization, Google Business Profile, Google Ads, local SEO
- Email & Conversion: email marketing, A/B testing, conversion optimization
- Analytics & Reporting: Google Analytics 4 setup, Looker Studio dashboards, performance tracking
- Strategy & Implementation: digital strategy, technology audits, platform migrations, vendor coordination

## Selected Projects

Personal projects shipped using Claude as a development partner:

- RT Pottery (rtpottery.com): Live e-commerce site for ceramics business. React + Vite + Tailwind, Cloudflare Pages + Functions, D1, KV, R2.
- Shelob Web (shelobweb.com): Multi-tenant website health monitoring SaaS with Stripe billing and Workers AI fix suggestions.
- Trade Pourtal (tradepourtal.com): Multi-tenant SaaS for wine trade asset management with RBAC, JWT auth, and audit logging.
- AI Job Search Agent: Job aggregation with AI scoring and cover letter generation using Workers AI.
- In My Life: Self-hosted task and notification system with multi-channel escalation on Cloudflare Workers.

- Location: Oakland, CA

## Experience Highlights

- Built custom Digital Asset Management platform on Cloudflare Workers, replacing $30K+/year solutions at ~$600/year
- Led $20M e-commerce platform migration across 6 brands
- Directed technical operations for 30+ e-commerce websites with a frontend engineering team
- Six years of people management: hiring, performance management, career development
- Reduced page load times by up to 80%
- Built Black Friday/Cyber Monday infrastructure supporting $245K+ in sales across 750+ orders
- Ran A/B testing and CRO programs using Optimizely, VWO, Google Optimize, and Lucky Orange
- Built unified GA4 and Looker Studio dashboards; identified $436K in transactions with no prior visibility
- BFA in Graphic Design from Cal Poly Pomona
